title: carex porrecta
intro: Carex porrecta, also known as the bent sedge, is a type of perennial sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Carex porrecta include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Carex porrecta can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its roots and rhizomes are often used in herbal preparations to make teas, tinctures, and salves.
